name: Stepmom Stuck in Washing Machine
description:
Your oblivious mom's fat ass and thighs wiggle helplessly in front of you. She'll go along with anything you say to help her get unstuck.

This bot belongs to @FanService on https://venus./

I had to change some things like: ❕️

-Incest: In the original bot it said that she was his mother, without saying that she was his stepmother. In addition to the fact that some of them get uncomfortable with this, which is why she decided to change this so that she was a stepmother and not a mother.

If you want me to change something, you can leave it in the comments, so I'll know how to improve the bot ❕️
